name: Flex Pet Bed Maroon On Black Small
shortDescription: The Flex Pet Bed offers the perfect balance of comfort, durability, and convenience for small dogs and cats. Crafted with soft, supportive materials , it creates a cozy haven for rest and relaxation. Its lightweight design allows easy repositioning anywhere in your home, while the washable cover ensures effortless cleaning and long-lasting freshness.
